value.found_quote: Codex handles orchestration across agents, including spawning new subagents, routing follow-up instructions, waiting for results, and closing agent threads.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that Codex handles orchestration across agents, covering all four aspects mentioned in the claim: spawning, routing instructions, waiting for results, and closing threads. The page also notes that "Current Codex releases enable subagent workflows by default," indicating this is an active, generally available feature.
